description: Fix file dates after Google Photos Takeout export A PowerShell script that uses ExifTool to restore correct file system timestamps on exported Google Takeout media. For images (JPG, TIFF, etc.), it sets FileModifyDate and FileCreateDate from DateTimeOriginal when available, falling back to ModifyDate if not. For MP4 videos, it uses CreateDate. Run it from the folder containing your exported files.
